other_observers: John Drummond, Cara Caragher, Cici Lee, Jeannie and Ron Mitchell, Ken and Christie Pals; first found at David Perl's yard on 3 December. 501 Echo Lane in the same Pleasant Valley neighborhood of Colorado Springs, 80904. It was at the Pals' house from 5-7 December.
specific_location: Ken Pals house, 1310 Whitehouse Dr. Pleasant Valley neighborhood of Colorado Springs, 80904
description: small finch with small all-yellow bill. Blackish below and above the yellow bill. Breast white with buffy wash and with wide dark gray streaks. Undertail coverts white but with dark streaks. Back brown with dark vertical streaks. Crown with red "poll" that was quite noticeable.Behaviors: came into feeder with pieces of sunflower seeds where it competed with AMGOs and PISIs for the food.Call: none heardPlumage: adult winter
